series_metadata.series_description: This series serves to document the deployment of Division-owned and operated Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS) for training and mission purposes. This series contains any paper or machine-readable documents generated to record the required information when a UAS is put into operation. Specifically, the series will record the OHP 7167, Unmanned Aerial Systems Flight Log.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) years plus current year. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years plus current year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
